ksa_text: Analyze, define, and document data requirements, specifications, and priority information needs for organizational applications.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-T-010 (DQ, Task) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4185 is insufficient to establish relevance to performance metrics, KPI analysis, and operational reporting at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.418, onet=0.413, dcwf=0.409) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4185 below threshold for moderate fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does DQ-domain KSA DQ-T-010 (composite 0.4185) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4185 for DQ domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per DCAT-AP, DAMA DMBOK data quality competency framework; DQ awareness is a documented expectation in senior IC analyst roles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Performance Analyst at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms DQ domain KSA at composite 0.4185 is not a standard requirement for Performance Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4185, domain DQ, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
